message:
refactor(s3fifo): consolidate fallback reason enum and add comprehensive policy tests

Move S3FifoFallbackReason from hostcall_queue to the canonical
hostcall_s3_fifo module to eliminate definition duplication. Rename
variants to match the taxonomy used in telemetry: InsufficientSignalQuality
→ SignalQualityInsufficient, UnstableAdmissionFeedback → FairnessInstability.

Add 8 new S3-FIFO policy tests covering:
- Fallback clear recovers from bypass mode
- Owner budget rejects third unique live key beyond max_entries_per_owner
- Ghost hit reentry admits from ghost history with correct counters
- Telemetry snapshot invariants (live_depth = small + main, owner sum matches)
- Fallback bypass emits conservative reason and correct tier markers
- Identical sequences yield deterministic decision + telemetry traces
- Fallback fairness window uses strictly-greater budget threshold
- Signal quality fallback reason does not flip under later pressure

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
